data.name: Beach Girl Block Crush!!
data.detailed_description:
A good retro block breaking game.
First destroy all the blocks, and then destroy the swimsuit!!

Total of 10 stages. You can play with just the mouse.
Get the highest score in each stage. Also contains Steam achievements.

*All characters appearing in this game are over 18 years old
data.about_the_game:
A good retro block breaking game.
First destroy all the blocks, and then destroy the swimsuit!!

Total of 10 stages. You can play with just the mouse.

*All characters appearing in this game are over 18 years old
data.short_description: Breaking blocks in the summer sea!! First, destroy all the blocks, then destroy the swimsuit!!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
